Class NodeExecStats.Builder

java.lang.Object
com.google.protobuf.AbstractMessageLite.Builder
com.google.protobuf.AbstractMessage.Builder<NodeExecStats.Builder>
com.google.protobuf.GeneratedMessage.Builder<NodeExecStats.Builder>
org.tensorflow.proto.NodeExecStats.Builder
All Implemented Interfaces:
Message.Builder, MessageLite.Builder, MessageLiteOrBuilder, MessageOrBuilder, Cloneable, NodeExecStatsOrBuilder
Enclosing class:
NodeExecStats
public static final class NodeExecStats.Builder extends GeneratedMessage.Builder<NodeExecStats.Builder> implements NodeExecStatsOrBuilder
Time/size stats recorded for a single execution of a graph node.
Protobuf type tensorflow.NodeExecStats

    • getNodeName

      public String getNodeName()
      TODO(tucker): Use some more compact form of node identity than
the full string name.  Either all processes should agree on a
global id (cost_id?) for each node, or we should use a hash of
the name.
      string node_name = 1;
